response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled polyglot software engineer with 15+ years of hands-on development experience, but the profile is fundamentally misaligned with a CTO role. There is no executive, director, or even engineering-manager title anywhere in the career history, no evidence of team building or headcount scaling, and the only AI-agent exposure is a few months of contributor-level tooling work at his current employer — far short of the production multi-agent architecture and regulated-fintech leadership the role demands.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience spanning distributed systems, microservices, and multiple languages/stacks
Hands-on exposure to high-throughput distributed systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), demonstrating real performance-engineering instincts
Recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals active engagement with the agentic-AI space
concerns: No executive, management, or technical-leadership role of any kind in the entire 15-year career — the role requires 5+ years of senior technical leadership at scale
AI/agentic-systems experience is limited to a few months of contributor-level work and described vaguely; no evidence of architecting or operating production multi-agent systems
Fintech exposure is shallow: the RIDE Capital role was as a senior developer with no mention of credit systems, payment flows, compliance, or multi-jurisdiction regulatory work

key_factors.factor: Absence of any engineering leadership history
